fixes_applied.description: Gate was using task_id from brief.get('task_id') but injected tasks use task_id at top level
fixes_applied.fix: Changed task_id extraction to: brief.get('task_id') or brief.get('brief', {}).get('task_id') or str(time.time())
fixes_applied.line: Modified task_id assignment before gate pending file write

fixes.fix_a: Increased wait_for_approval() default timeout from 1800 to 3600 seconds (60 minutes)

fixes.fix_b: Moved send_telegram() call to fire IMMEDIATELY after research quality gate finishes, BEFORE wait_for_approval() is called

fixes_applied.fix: Added concurrent research gathering with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=3) and as_completed() loop
fixes_applied.implementation: Created research_competitor() wrapper function and submit all 3 competitors in parallel

notes: All three bugs fixed and validated. Concurrent research gathering will dramatically reduce wall-clock time on research phase.
